lyrics:
[verse]
Mmm mmm mmm mmm
La la la la
Mmm mmm mmm mmm
Shh shh shh shh

[verse]

La la la la
Mmm mmm mmm mmm
La la la la

[verse]

La la la
Mmm mmm
La la
Mmm
style_prompt: Solo female vocal lullaby, humming only, no instruments, no melody variation, sustained warm tones, 58 BPM, extremely intimate, breathy, mouth-closed humming, monotone drone, like breathing set to pitch, meditative, hypnotic, the simplest possible sound, no percussion, no rhythm section, pure voice

title: Rock-a-bye
lyrics:
[verse]
Rock-a-bye, rock-a-bye
Rock-a-bye over the sea
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye
Come back to me
Sailing on moonlight rocking on air
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye I'll meet you there

[chorus]
Sway and sway and sway and sleep
Sway and sway and sway and sleep

[verse]
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye into the night
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye hold on tight
Carried by starlight drifting so slow
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye let yourself go

[chorus]
Sway and sway and sway and sleep
Sway and sway and sway and sleep
Rock-a-bye goodnight
style_prompt: Traditional cradle song, warm maternal female vocal, harp arpeggios, 6/8 time signature, 64 BPM, swaying rocking rhythm, gentle lilting motion, the feeling of being carried and rocked, celtic lullaby influence, soft vibrato, repetitive swinging pattern

title: You Are Safe
cover_prompt: Watercolor, warm glowing house at night, strong walls, warm light in window, stars above, solid safe golden warmth
lyrics:
[verse]
I am here
The walls are strong the door is shut
The blanket wrapped around
And nothing from the dark outside
Can make a single sound

[chorus]
I am here, I am here
Nothing going to come
I am here, I am here
You are safe at home

[verse]
The shadows are just shapes that play
They cannot touch they cannot stay
And every sound you hear tonight
Is just the house that holds you tight

[chorus]
I am here, I am here
Nothing going to come
I am here, I am here
I am still here
style_prompt: Protective lullaby, warm female vocal, low register, simple piano chords, 62 BPM, steady, certain, grounded, reassuring, no vibrato, direct delivery, like a spoken promise set to a simple melody, minimal melodic movement, unwavering, soft piano accompaniment

title: How Dreams Began
cover_prompt: Watercolor, single star falling through vast night sky, cracking open revealing golden light, deep blue, ancient, mythological
lyrics:
[verse]
Long before you were born
Before there were dreams the night was just dark
And no one knew why they would sleep
Until a small star fell out of the sky
And cracked open soft warm and deep

[chorus]
And that was the first dream
The very first one
It taught all the others
How dreaming is done

[verse]
It floated through windows of every house
And showed the sleeping world things
Mountains that talked and oceans that sang
And fish that had feathery wings

[chorus]
And that was the first dream
The very first one
And it's still true tonight
style_prompt: Ancient storytelling lullaby, warm resonant female vocal, singing bowl and soft cello drone, 60 BPM, mythological, vast, reverent, timeless, the voice of someone very old and very kind, starts spacious and narrows to intimate, wonder without weight, low drone pad accompaniment

title: Nalu and the Warm Hum
cover_prompt: A small, round seal pup curled on a moonlit shore, wrapped in soft kelp blankets, with gentle waves lapping nearby. The scene glows in warm amber and deep blues, like a cozy nest by the sea.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mmm naa lu lu
Mmm naa lu lu
Shh naa lu mmm
Shh naa lu mmm

[verse]
Mmm naa loo loo
Mmm naa loo loo
Shh naa loo mmm
Shh naa loo mmm

[verse]
Mmm naa lee lee
Mmm naa lee lee
Shh naa lee mmm
Shh naa lee mmm
style_prompt: Protective lullaby, warm female vocal, low register, simple piano chords, 62 BPM, steady, certain, grounded, reassuring, no vibrato, direct delivery, like a spoken promise set to a simple melody, minimal melodic movement, unwavering, soft piano accompaniment

character.name: Nalu
character.identity: A gentle seal pup who hums the ocean’s safety into the night.
character.special: Carries the rhythm of the waves in their voice, always steady and warm.

about: A soothing, repetitive lullaby that mimics the unwavering rhythm of ocean waves. The steady, humming pattern creates a shield of sound, wrapping little ones in warmth and security. Perfect for anxious minds needing the comfort of consistency.
